verbatim_text: That's how many layers it takes to compute the state up to a particular sequence length. And we see this generally logarithmic dependence of depth on sequence length. And so this signature is inconsistent with the sequential and parallel algorithms, but consistent with the associative algorithm. Our activation patching experiments also show very similar results. I'm not going to go through the full details, but basically what we're trying to isolate in these experiments is where does the first token get consumed? And again, we see something like a logarithmic dependence on depth on sequence length. Okay, so both of these pieces of evidence point to the associative algorithm.
